Data-extractor Documentation
==============================

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

   modules

Overview
--------

Data-extractor reads Anscombe's Quartet from a tab-separated CSV
and outputs four Newline-Delimited JSON files, one per data series.

==================

* :ref:`genindex`
* :ref:`modindex`
* :ref:`search`
